description_long: This is a wooden chair with a rectangular seat and a tall, slatted backrest composed of three horizontal wooden slats. The seat and backrest are made from a dark, textured wood, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The chair is supported by four straight legs, which appear to be made of a different material, possibly metal, with a grayish tone. The overall design is simple and functional, with no armrests and a slightly angled backrest for ergonomic support. The wood grain is visible throughout the seat and backrest, adding to its visual interest. This chair would be suitable for use in urban parks, public seating areas, or outdoor cafes.
description: A rustic wooden chair with a slatted backrest and four straight, gray-toned legs, combining wood and metal for a sturdy, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled, slatted backrest and the flat wooden seat with two visible legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three horizontal slats of the backrest and the rectangular seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side, with the same angled backrest and two legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest slats and the seat, with all four legs visible.
